subject: WM-0087 ready for review
body: WM-0087 rerun after third review: Chrome/Edge web-performance evidence unchanged; default benchmark sampling remains 9 samples / 2 warmups for entity-store stability; map-dirty now keeps the original dirtyCellsInsideChunk coordinate/updateCell workload and original timer window while averaging 16 identical passes per sample; baseline and 10%/20% thresholds remain unchanged. Isolated map-dirty reruns passed 5/5 at 0.835-0.908ms median vs 1.000ms baseline. Isolated full-suite reruns passed twice with entity-store 236.986ms and 239.861ms vs 244.507ms baseline, m5-alpha-content-long-run 51.904ms and 50.825ms vs 74.634ms baseline, and map-dirty 1.081ms and 0.923ms vs 1.000ms baseline. pnpm test:e2e --filter web-shell, taskctl validate, git diff --check, and pnpm quality all passed.
